tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take their project work, but I need to finish my own share first. This feels like extra pressure right now.

desires: Finish my own project share before 19:00 so I can claim the 'I did my job' win and stop feeling like a pushover.
Avoid saying no to Teammate A right now; if I reject them, they'll see me as uncooperative even though I'm already overwhelmed.
Get through this afternoon without crashing from the sleep debt, because tomorrow's lecture is coming up and I can't afford to look tired.

goals.description: Finish my own project share and send it by 19:00 to secure the 'I did my job' win.
goals.rationale: My core value is achievement; completing my specific task gives me the control I need right now. If I don't finish this, I feel like a pushover.

goals.description: Politely decline Teammate A's request to do their part without starting an argument.
goals.rationale: I am conflict-avoidant and fear being seen as uncooperative. However, saying yes would mean missing my deadline. I'll only address this after I've secured my own win so I have the emotional buffer to say no.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to secure my 'I did my job' win by 19:00 first; taking their task now risks missing my deadline. I'll set a boundary now to avoid the friction later when I'm stressed and focused on finishing my own share.
